title: Spectrum Governance Manifest
description: Required governance manifest (.spectrum-governance.json) for downstream repositories.

repo_name.description: Repository name for the governed system.

repo_type.description: Repository type (e.g., operational_engine, advisory, template, governance).

governance_repo.description: Repository slug or name for the governance source (e.g., spectrum-systems or nicklasorte/spectrum-systems).

governance_version.description: Pinned governance release version (semver or calendar-semver).

upstream_systems.description: Optional list of system_ids that provide inputs to this system.

downstream_systems.description: Optional list of system_ids that consume outputs from this system.

contracts.description: Map of contract names to pinned versions.
